subcodes.title: Words to Mr Pinchot and others, spoken on 1912-06-04
subcodes.first_line: It will certainly come about but America will not participate in it. This war will be staged in Europe. You are in a corner
subcodes.first_line_orig: لابد خواهد شد اما امریکا داخل نمیشود این جنگ در اروپا می شود شما یک گوشه ئی راگرفته اید
subcodes.subjects: @status of kings; future of monarchy, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @predictions and prophecies
